# 失配树

```cpp
void solve(){
    string s;
    cin>>s;
    int n=s.size();
    s=" "+s;
    vector<int> ne(n+1),dep(n+1);
    vector par(n+1,vector<int>(25));
    par[1][0]=0;
    dep[1]=1;
    for(int i=2,j=0;i<=n;i++){
        while(j&&s[i]!=s[j+1])j=ne[j];
        if(s[i]==s[j+1])j++;
        ne[i]=j;
        dep[i]=dep[j]+1;
        par[i][0]=j;
    }
    for(int j=1;j<22;j++){
        for(int i=1;i<=n;i++)par[i][j]=par[par[i][j-1]][j-1];
    }
    int m;
    cin>>m;
    while(m--){
        int u,v;
        cin>>u>>v;
        if(dep[u]<dep[v])swap(u,v);
        while(dep[u]>dep[v])u=par[u][__lg(dep[u]-dep[v])];
        if(u==v){
            cout<<ne[u]<<"\n";
            continue;
        }
        for(int i=__lg(dep[u]);i>=0;i--){
            if(par[u][i]!=par[v][i])u=par[u][i],v=par[v][i];
        }
        cout<<par[u][0]<<"\n";
    }
} 
```
